description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2-development branch. The workflow should have a build job that runs on multiple operating systems and ROS2 distributions, including rolling, humble, galactic, foxy, eloquent, and dashing. For each distribution and OS combination, the job should set up a ROS2 workspace, check copyright and line endings, install dependencies, build the RealSense SDK, and run tests.
